summary:
Detailed implementation plan for Phase 4 of CirclCare AI covering:
- 4.1: Full rebuild of the BookingTimeline/Status screen with animated vertical step timeline, status banners, ETA display, and polling
- 4.1b: New useBookingStatus hook for polling backend status and simulating steps
- 4.2: Backend endpoints confirmed already exist (no changes needed)
- 4.3: Provider Dashboard Screen as a modal accessible from Profile tab, plus Profile tab rebuild
- Verification plan covering TypeScript check and manual E2E flow
- Notes on store usage and demo simulation behavior
